name: Seven Veg Couscous
recipeIngredient: 1 medium yellow summer squash, chopped into 1/4 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare couscous according to package instructions, stirring in the couscous when you fluff it. Alternatively, substitute brown rice.
2. Saute onions until tender in a large saucepan or soup pot using your favorite oil substitute.
3. Add remaining ingredients except water. Cover and reduce heat to low.
4. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 15 to 20 minutes. Add water as needed to produce a moist, but not soupy stew.
5. Serve over couscous or brown rice.
6. For easier preparation, use canned chickpeas. You could also use canned tomatoes. Fresh ginger root is essential; store it in the freezer wrapped in plastic for easy grating when frozen.
